title: Senior Visual Merchandiser at Berger Silk Store Advisory Limited

jsonLd.title: Senior Visual Merchandiser at Berger Silk Store Advisory Limited
jsonLd.description:
Berger Silk Store Advisory Limited is actively seeking a talented and motivated Visual Merchandiser to join our dynamic team in Ghaziabad. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About Berger Silk Store Advisory Limited:
Berger Silk Store Advisory Limited is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Monitor inventory levels and coordinate replenishment activities
• Conduct regular stock audits and prevent pilferage
• Achieve sales targets and improve store performance metrics
• Train and motivate the sales team to deliver excellent service
• Manage store operations to ensure smooth daily functioning
• Manage shrinkage and reduce stock discrepancies
• Assist in recruiting, onboarding, and performance management of staff

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBA from a recognized university
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Inventory Management
• Proficiency in SAP Retail
• Proficiency in Retail Analytics
• Proficiency in Category Management
• Proficiency in Retail Operations
• Proficiency in Shrinkage Control
• Proficiency in CRM
• Proficiency in Sales Techniques

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Flexible working hours
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Professional development and training programs
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Ghaziabad, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Berger Silk Store Advisory Limited!
